Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section1_body1: When you create an Evolved AI account, we collect your email address and encrypted password. When you connect WhatsApp, we store the channel identifier needed to route messages between you and your assistant.
Privacy.section1_body2: We also collect message content sent between you and your assistant to provide conversation context and improve the experience. Messages are stored securely and associated with your account.
Privacy.section2_item1: Provide and maintain the Evolved AI service
Privacy.section2_item2: Route messages between you and your AI assistant
Privacy.section2_item3: Maintain conversation context for personalized responses
Privacy.section2_item6: Improve our service and develop new features
Privacy.section3_intro: We use the following third-party services:
Privacy.section3_item1: NVIDIA NIMs — AI model provider for generating responses
Privacy.section3_body: These services have their own privacy policies. Message content is transmitted to our AI provider to generate responses. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
Privacy.section4_body: Your data is stored on secure servers. Passwords are hashed using bcrypt. We use HTTPS for all data transmission. While we implement reasonable security measures, no internet transmission is 100% secure.
Privacy.section5_body: We retain your account data and message history for as long as your account is active. You can request deletion of your account and associated data by contacting us or using the account deletion option in your settings.
Privacy.section7_body: If you have questions about this privacy policy or your data, contact us at

Chat.emptyHint: Type a message below or chat on WhatsApp — it all shows up here.

Landing.heroSub: You deserve more than survival mode. This AI assistant handles your calendar, inbox, tasks, wellness, and boundaries via WhatsApp, so you can move from overwhelm to alignment.
Landing.heroNote: $49/month after trial · Auto-renews · Cancel anytime · Lives in WhatsApp
Landing.chatUser1: I have back-to-back meetings tomorrow and I still need to prep my quarterly review. Help me plan my day.
Landing.chatBot1p1: Let's get you organized. I see your meetings run 9am–2pm. Here's what I'd suggest:
Landing.chatBot1Highlight: prep your top 3 review talking points tonight
Landing.chatBot1p2: (I drafted some based on your goals) and I'll send you a morning briefing at 7am with your full schedule.
Landing.chatUser2: Yes please. Also remind me to email Sarah about the project handoff.
Landing.chatBot2p2: . I also drafted a quick handoff email for you. Want to review it now or after your day?
Landing.problemTitle: You didn't build this life to feel
Landing.problemText: You're ambitious, capable, and driven. But somewhere between the packed schedules, emotional weight, leadership challenges, and a personal life that keeps shrinking — you lost the alignment between who you are and how you're living. Your AI assistant is the daily tool that makes alignment possible — by lifting the mental load that keeps pulling you away from the life you're building.
Landing.stat1Label: hours a week lost to admin & mental load
Landing.stat3Label: from sign-up to your first AI briefing
Landing.featuresTitle: The daily support that moves you
Landing.feat1Body: Plan your week. Draft difficult emails. Prep talking points for your meetings. Organize deadlines. She handles the mental load so you can focus on what matters.
Landing.feat2Body: Syncs with your Gmail and Calendar. Morning briefings, smart reminders, and drafted responses — delivered right to your WhatsApp every day.
Landing.feat3Body: Navigate team challenges, set boundaries, prep for career moves — with frameworks grounded in neuroscience and values-based living woven into every interaction.
Landing.feat4Body: Energy management check-ins. Values-aligned goal tracking. Moving you from force to flow — not just at work, but in your whole life.
Landing.feat5Body: Birthday reminders, reach-out nudges for people you care about, date night ideas, and boundary scripts when you need to say no — firmly but kindly.
Landing.feat6Body: Expense tracking, budget check-ins, bill reminders, debt payoff tracking. Not financial advice — financial awareness. She helps you see where your money goes.
Landing.how1Body: One click connects your Gmail and Calendar. That's it — no complicated setup, no settings pages, no tech skills required.
Landing.how2Body: Save the number, send "Hi." Your assistant lives in WhatsApp — no apps to download, no dashboards to learn. You just text.
Landing.how3Body: She introduces herself, learns about your world, and delivers your first briefing — calendar, inbox, and an actionable suggestion — in under a minute.
Landing.compareTitle: AI alone helps. AI + a human guide
Landing.compareDesc: A general chatbot can answer questions. Your Evolved AI handles your actual life. But the deepest transformation happens when AI handles the daily load and a coach helps you redesign the bigger picture.
Landing.compareFeature3: Lives in WhatsApp — no extra apps
Landing.compareFeature8: Drafts emails & manages tasks for you
Landing.compareBottomNote: Start with the AI — it handles your daily overwhelm from Day 1. When you're ready for deeper transformation, the coaching and community are here to take you further. The AI makes alignment possible. A human guide makes it permanent.
Landing.pricingTagline: From overwhelm to alignment — every single day
Landing.pricingNote: Credit card required · Auto-renews at $49/month · Cancel anytime before trial ends
Landing.pricingAddonDesc: Book a 1:1 setup call. We'll walk you through everything and make sure your first week is transformative.
Landing.ecosystemTitle: Your AI is part of something
Landing.eco1Body: Community, CE credits, monthly group coaching, meditation library, and masterclasses.
Landing.eco2Body: Your 24/7 personal chief of staff — the daily tool that moves you from overwhelm to alignment. Calendar, email, tasks, wellness, and more.
Landing.eco3Body: Personalized coaching with a certified guide. Custom career strategy, deep accountability, and transformation.
Landing.testimonialQuote: I used to spend my entire Sunday evening dreading Monday's admin. Now my AI handles my schedule, drafts my emails, and even reminds me to breathe between meetings. It's like having a chief of staff who actually gets my life.
Landing.faq1Q: Do I need to be tech-savvy to use this?
Landing.faq1A: Not at all. You sign in with Google, save a WhatsApp number, and send "Hi." That's it. Your assistant walks you through everything from there — no settings pages, no dashboards, no technical setup required.
Landing.faq2Q: How is this different from ChatGPT?
Landing.faq2A: ChatGPT can't connect to your email, manage your calendar, or send you a morning briefing. Your Evolved AI is a fully integrated personal assistant that lives in WhatsApp — plus she's built with coaching frameworks, so she understands the unique challenges you face.
Landing.faq3Q: Will it read all my emails?
Landing.faq3A: She can access your Gmail to summarize what's important, flag urgent items, and draft replies — but she never sends anything without your explicit approval. You're always in control.
Landing.faq4Q: Is this a replacement for coaching?
Landing.faq4A: Not at all — it's a complement. The AI handles your daily productivity and mental load, with leadership and wellness frameworks baked into every interaction. For deep transformation work, our 1:1 coaching program is the next step.
Landing.faq5Q: Is my data private and secure?
Landing.faq5A: Absolutely. Your conversations and connected accounts are encrypted and never shared with anyone. Your assistant runs on secure, private infrastructure — your data stays yours, always.
Landing.faq6A: Yes, completely. No contracts and no cancellation fees. Your 3-day trial is free — just enter your card to get started. If you love it (and we think you will), your subscription automatically continues at $49/month. If not, cancel before the trial ends and you won't be charged.
Landing.faq7Q: What if I don't use Gmail?
Landing.faq7A: Right now, the assistant integrates with Google (Gmail + Google Calendar). If you use a different email provider, you can still use all the non-email features — tasks, wellness, reminders, boundary scripting, and more. We're exploring additional integrations for the future.
Landing.ctaTitle2: — from overwhelm to alignment, every day
Landing.ctaSub: Your AI chief of staff is the daily tool that makes it real. $49/month. Every feature included. Try free for 3 days.
Landing.footerCopyright: © The Evolved Vets, 2026. Powered by Evolved AI.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section1_body: By accessing or using Evolved AI, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Evolved AI.
Terms.section2_body: Evolved AI provides an AI-powered personal assistant accessible through WhatsApp and a web dashboard. The service includes calendar management, email triage, task tracking, wellness check-ins, and other productivity features. The service requires an active subscription and a WhatsApp-capable device.
Terms.section3_body: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must be at least 18 years old to use this service. One account per person; sharing accounts is not permitted.
Terms.section4_body: Evolved AI is offered as a monthly subscription at $49/month, with a 3-day free trial for new subscribers. Payment is processed through our payment provider. Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled before the renewal date. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis within the first 7 days of a billing cycle.
Terms.section5_body: You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose, to send spam or unsolicited messages through the service, to attempt to reverse-engineer or exploit the system, to share your account with others, or to use the service in any way that could harm other users or the platform. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.
Terms.section6_body: Evolved AI is an AI assistant, not a licensed professional. The service does not provide medical, legal, financial, or therapeutic advice. AI responses may occasionally be inaccurate. All email sends and calendar modifications require your explicit confirmation. You are responsible for verifying any information provided by the assistant before acting on it.
Terms.section7_body: All content, design, and technology comprising the Evolved AI service are owned by us and protected by intellectual property laws. Your conversation data belongs to you. You grant us a limited license to process your data solely to provide the service.
Terms.section8_body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Evolved AI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid for the service in the 12 months preceding the claim.
Terms.section9_body: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through the service. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
Terms.section10_body: For questions about these terms, contact us at
